prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TTX-PLATSAFETYACIDTESTKIT-7PC-BUN Product Type: ART_AND_CRAFT_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit with Safety Glasses Testing Stone Pipettes Glass Vials, 7pc Description: Safely test for platinum purity with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Purity Testing Safety Kit. The kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum purity testing solution will see you through hundreds of tests. A must-have tool for gold panning, coin collectors, antiques and jewelry appraisal, or other professions that work with precious metals.

PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is ideally used on material that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished platinum items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish of the item

TESTING FOR PLATINUM: To test for platinum purity , scratch the item onto the thoroughly washed test stone, leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the material is of of pure platinum content, the solution will not change and the deposit will remain unaffected

SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing. Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions. Search Terms: precious metal testing tester kit stone scratch kit jewelry appraisal tools precious metal verifier fine rush heavy metal test silver platinum solution lab accessories collector essentials mining purity karat long lasting Features: - PLATINUM TESTING KIT: Safely test platinum purity and quality; kit includes x1 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottle, x1 pair of safety glasses, x2 plastic pipettes, x2 glass vials and x1 testing stone; the platinum testing solution is effective and will see you through hundreds of tests - PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is ideally used on platinum material that has yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished platinum items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise the finish - HOW THE PLATINUM TESTING KIT WORKS: To test for platinum purity, scratch the item on to the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the deposit is in fact of pure platinum content, the deposit and solution will remain unaffected - SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA - NOTE: Keep out of reach of children; Use caution when opening and using; Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended; Instruction pamphlet included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit 7pc with Safety Glasses

tokens.name: Platinum Testing Kit with Safety Glasses

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit with Safety Glasses and Stone

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes Testing Stone, Pipettes, Glass Vials, Safety Glasses, Hundreds Of Tests, USA Made Solution

openai.title_differentiation: Shatterproof 05Oz Bottle, Safety Glasses, Pipettes, Glass Vials, Testing Stone, For Precious Metals
